title: Bethal Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Bethal, with a Z-Score of -3.00. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Bethal are extremely cold, with a high demand for heating. The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 11.5 GG, indicating a significant need for heating energy.
 The humidity level is at 83%, and the wind speed is moderate at 6.1 km/h. These conditions are expected to persist, exacerbating the cold snap.
 The city's infrastructure and residents are likely to be severely impacted, with potential disruptions to daily life and economic activities.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
